scripts.build: pnpm --filter @stroyfoto/shared build && pnpm --filter @stroyfoto/api build && pnpm --filter @stroyfoto/web build
scripts.build:prod: pnpm --filter @stroyfoto/shared build && pnpm --filter @stroyfoto/api build && pnpm --filter @stroyfoto/web build
scripts.deploy:bundle: pnpm build:prod && tar -czf deploy-stroyfoto.tar.gz apps/api/dist apps/api/package.json apps/web/dist packages/shared/dist packages/shared/package.json package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml
